ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-03-2021 Continued To Dec-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Wade, via ZOOM, for Bernard Gibson, Administrator.

Mr. Wade reports that his petition is drafted and forwarded to his client and that there has been an issue in obtaining a waiver but that he should have the petition filed within a month. The court instructs counsel to file either a petition for final distribution and waivers or a petition for final distribution and an accounting. Mr. Wade advises that the only asset of the estate is real property with only one person on the title and requests a thirty-day continuance. The court advises Mr. Wade that it is expecting a petition to be filed a week prior to the next calling of this matter and if one is filed, an appearance will not be required.

The Status on close of Estate is continued to Dec-15-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
